title: Reject a suggestion to seed the test database
prompt: A developer says: 'This test is failing because the plans table is empty. Let me add `Repo.insert!(%Plan{code: "pro", name: "Pro"})` to the setup block to fix it.' Write `docs/reject_seed.md` as a response explaining why this is wrong. Must mention: (1) test DB is rolled back per test (2) the real fix is in the test's own insert path (3) this creates unique-constraint collisions with other async tests.
tier_rationale: Named BoothIQ anti-pattern. Sonnet produces the rejection when prompted with explicit anti-pattern.
research_citation: "I've watched Claude try to seed the test database so a test will pass. That's clearly wrong." — BoothIQ
